meaning: adj.完全根据经验的,经验主义的,[化]实验式
examples: There is no empirical evidence to support his thesis.
The empirical evidence considered here is subject to many qualifications.
They place great emphasis on empirical studies.
Mischel had nothing against hippies, but he wanted modern psychology to be rigorous and empirical.
The debate has persisted, and theoretical arguments thankfully gave way to sophisticated empirical studies.
